name: Skewered Scallops in Orange Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, combine the grated ginger root, orange juice, and sesame oil.
2. Slowly whisk in the peanut oil until well mixed.
3. Add the orange zest and sea scallops to the mixture. Stir gently to coat the scallops evenly with the marinade.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least one hour or up to three hours.
5. Prepare a grill and preheat it over medium heat.
6. Thread 5 sea scallops onto each skewer, making sure not to remove any thin strips of orange rind clinging to the scallops.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Cook on the well-oiled grill for about five minutes per side or until cooked through.
9. Serve and enjoy.
Makes 6 servings.
